title: Relationship Between Points in a Metric Space
description: A Venn diagram showing the relationship between limit points, isolated points, and other points in a subset of a metric space.
elements: Set S (Subset of Metric Space X)
relationships: All isolated points are boundary points
A point can be both a limit point and an interior point
Limit points are points where every neighborhood contains another point of S
Isolated points have a neighborhood containing no other points of S
